_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Incorporate cyber operations and communications security support plans into organization objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.448), LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.442).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.428). Shared vocabulary: [plans]. DCWF-only terms [communications, cyber, incorporate, objectives, operations, organization] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.865, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.9%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Incorporate cyber operations and communications security support plans into orga" and "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.457 ≈ STS 0.428 (gap 0.029). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [plans] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [plans]. DCWF-only: [communications, cyber, incorporate, objectives, operations, organization]. WIDAI-only: [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain].
